title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Landmark Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
